creator: jerry.jacobs@xor-gate.org
text:
I know this ticket is closed but had similar problem but with transmission. Probably mismatch between pkg and base.

I was on:FreeBSD pineapple.srv.xor-gate.org 13.3-RELEASE-p5 FreeBSD 13.3-RELEASE-p5 GENERIC amd64

Error:

root@pineapple:/home/jerry # service transmission start
Starting transmission.
ld-elf.so.1: /lib/libcxxrt.so.1: version CXXABI_1.3.11 required by /usr/local/bin/transmission-daemon not found
/usr/local/etc/rc.d/transmission: WARNING: failed to start transmission

Fix:
$ freebsd-update fetch
$ freebsd-update upgrade -r 13.4-RELEASE
$ freebsd-update install
$ reboot
$ freebsd-update install
$ uname -a
FreeBSD pineapple.srv.xor-gate.org 13.4-RELEASE-p3 FreeBSD 13.4-RELEASE-p3 GENERIC amd64

It also did a pkg error mismatch fix (kernel compat?). Don't have stored the error message.

Hope this helps also others in the future when it happens because of pkg+base mismatch.
